title: gaultheria alnifolia
intro: Gaultheria alnifolia, also known as Mountain Tea or Eastern Sweet Gale, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gaultheria alnifolia include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce stress and improve digestion. Gaultheria alnifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical applications.
